Details:
* **Type**: String
* Captures the name of the service cluster on which HA will be set up. **Default value**: ``service_cluster``

* **Type**: Boolean
* **Possible values**: ``true``
* **Default value**: ``true``
* Indicates whether to enable HA for the Kubernetes (K8s) service node or not. Set to ``true`` to enable.

* **Type**: String
* This is a mandatory and user-configurable parameter.
* Captures the virtual IP address for the K8s service node HA setup. Ensure that the ``virtual_ip_address`` does not belong to the ``dynamic_range`` or ``static_range`` mentioned in the `network_spec.yml <../Provision/provisionparams.html#id6>`_.
* **Default value**: ``172.16.107.1``
